{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230210043C3B2AA21682A813705A"}"},"total":973},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6972806409851732739","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很不错，这一类题材很少有人写，而且并没有主角反派人物不在线的情况，必须火！
哈哈，作者菌之前看到分数那么高，结果评论少，后来发现更新的太快了😂
嗯…其实剧情不用更太快，不然影响可能有剧情细节，会看不懂（＃－.－）
不过有一说一，那么多真的看的好爽啊😁（还有之前说视频都给你，不过用完了只能点个赞，到时补上嘿嘿）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1623483010,"group_id":"6962411611747257351","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"赞我的人都是大帅逼和大漂亮ᕙ(⇀‸↼‶)ᕗ(. ❛ ᴗ ❛.)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/SraL15fPd5l6WAT/nL6HG8+9ccwRdY5VX8AIxbPtJJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c120b997c7ce492b991ecc154d3372ff~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795799&x-signature=TRrhdE7b%2Fv96YSCqO3Bwt62sOTM%3D","user_id":"3342948214769198","user_name":"咚会降损副本"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3342948214769198","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6962411611747257351","book_info":{"abstract":"克苏鲁+蒸汽+朋克+全球凶兽..恐怖复苏的庞大世界。（看此书需要带上脑子！）
占卜手段可以战斗？史莱姆可以成神？
战斗一定要靠野蛮冲撞？有脑子不用是傻子。
发展自己幕后组织，培养手下作为打手。
诺顿-库尔特，利用棋子，一次次拨动命运线。
只有当事情结束后，众人才震惊发现，原来自己只是一颗棋子！
人们称他为【史莱姆之主】【幕后支配者】【诡秘占卜师】【命运指引人】【布局大师】【旧神毁灭者】【船长】…","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/68769c1464e9d2e47f281883883fbf8c","author":"幕后天网","author_id":"","book_id":"6962411611747257351","book_name":"诡秘复苏：塔罗牌，从占卜家开始","book_short_name":"从占卜家开始","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5667人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1141,"name":"西方奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1141&name=西方奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":6,"name":"奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=6&name=奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":512,"name":"异世大陆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512&name=异世大陆&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6962418565223809544","read_count":"5667","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"521268"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"300","tags":"西方奇幻,奇幻仙侠,奇幻,玄幻,架空,异世大陆,克苏鲁,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oea076cd29e60cabdef51b4714f4c22fc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779387004&x-signature=4BFn3AngEO5PoBXSalcsAbgj94k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2321814990096557","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"349"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230210043C3B2AA21682A813705A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读23小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":60744,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":83571,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":21616},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1623483452,"author_reply_time":1623483456,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6972738941464429312","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大真的是太可爱了！几乎每一个评论都会点赞和回复
这本书真的是强烈推荐！我在番茄看了好久的书了，第一次看到这种题材写的这么好的！逻辑清晰，人物形象也比较丰满，并且遵循诡秘之主的设定，到现在都没有任何令人不适的烂俗的情节。行文也不拖沓，该细致的时候细致，该一笔带过的时候简略，不会使读者觉得难受。
作者的环境描写，人物刻画都非常喜欢，人物也有血有肉，并不像有些书一样。人物性格前后不矛盾，反转也总是出人意料！
赞美愚者！赞美天哥！
（五星好评送上！天哥加油更，质量保持住，自来水宣传大大滴有/doge）
求作者大大翻牌"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1623467300,"group_id":"6962411611747257351","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"赞美愚者！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8/YHHYQOHoFQTZIM167r/q/a1ozXGC3Qo9CK5pq+n/K","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cb895fa6782f461d9d8de1acc7e0d74a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787646&x-signature=nn5oDP2ED3mqsv97XmaQMYcF4Q0%3D","user_id":"2590084091624436","user_name":"“错误”先生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2590084091624436","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6962411611747257351","book_info":{"abstract":"克苏鲁+蒸汽+朋克+全球凶兽..恐怖复苏的庞大世界。（看此书需要带上脑子！）
占卜手段可以战斗？史莱姆可以成神？
战斗一定要靠野蛮冲撞？有脑子不用是傻子。
发展自己幕后组织，培养手下作为打手。
诺顿-库尔特，利用棋子，一次次拨动命运线。
只有当事情结束后，众人才震惊发现，原来自己只是一颗棋子！
人们称他为【史莱姆之主】【幕后支配者】【诡秘占卜师】【命运指引人】【布局大师】【旧神毁灭者】【船长】…","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/68769c1464e9d2e47f281883883fbf8c","author":"幕后天网","author_id":"","book_id":"6962411611747257351","book_name":"诡秘复苏：塔罗牌，从占卜家开始","book_short_name":"从占卜家开始","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5667人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1141,"name":"西方奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1141&name=西方奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":6,"name":"奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=6&name=奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":512,"name":"异世大陆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512&name=异世大陆&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6962418565223809544","read_count":"5667","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"521268"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"300","tags":"西方奇幻,奇幻仙侠,奇幻,玄幻,架空,异世大陆,克苏鲁,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oea076cd29e60cabdef51b4714f4c22fc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779387004&x-signature=4BFn3AngEO5PoBXSalcsAbgj94k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2321814990096557","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"14"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230210043C3B2AA21682A813705A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":918,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12605,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":14666},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1623467745,"author_reply_time":1623467795,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7192591466668540733","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"妈的，怎么有点不对劲,我仔细一看，怎么剧情也借鉴???
巨气！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1674655811,"group_id":"6962411611747257351","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1676114693460160"}},"expand":{"book_id":"6962411611747257351","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"654160"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"6","score_suffix_text":"阅读42分钟后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":46,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2499,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7192588343912448825","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"大家听我一言,不要再争吵了,诡秘之主确实是此类的开山鼻祖,也是一个里程碑,我在读了三遍之后，疯狂的寻找类似作品,但是因为诡秘的文笔设定是在太惊艳了,惊艳到读别的魔药序列等文，不说味同嚼蜡,但也让我难以读下去,我只能去看同人,但是诡秘同人,唉,因为太小众了,不像广为流传的遮天等文,诡秘的同人是在少的可怜,精品更是凤毛麟角,
正当我绝望的时候，作者出现了,不弱的文笔,加上很有水平的剧情把控,套上诡秘的设定,我粗略的跳翻几章,就知道这是一本好书,作者加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1674655064,"group_id":"6962411611747257351","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"阿巴巴巴，阿巴巴巴","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Dg7cpwIDNy4mGIdPwAtcQL7Iv7K4dIEHHxwiTjFsEq","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/49a973cf3dcd48cbb451549238e0fc50~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795389&x-signature=8%2BEjkSE%2BzXmEEixlyyVo6mbFDRc%3D","user_id":"1676114693460160","user_name":"小琉璃呀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1676114693460160","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1675998704,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6962411611747257351","book_info":{"abstract":"克苏鲁+蒸汽+朋克+全球凶兽..恐怖复苏的庞大世界。（看此书需要带上脑子！）
